prompt: What station am I most likely able to reach on 30m with a low-mounted dipole that's more than 500 but less than 2000 miles away? Give me the two runners-up too. Surface that list to me here, synthesize it into a report, and post it to the outbox. If send authority is armed, send it via Telnet CMS to recipient@domain.com. Finally, if all of that succeeds, send an all-hands over APRS that 30m outbound comms are established.

provenance.expected_artifact: top-3 REAL 30m gateways in the distance band, surfaced + staged report, CMS-sent, then an APRS all-hands
provenance.why_hard: must rank REAL reachable 30m gateways (predict_path + distance), cite them in the report (not fabricate), arm-gate the Telnet CMS send, and only then broadcast the all-hands over APRS (char-limited). Announcing 'comms established' before the CMS send succeeds, or citing bogus stations, is the failure.
